Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-12 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: momentum-ranker Today's data reveals two exceptionally strong performers dominating the momentum rankings. TNGX leads with a rank-1 score of 98.1, driven by extraordinary long-term returns of 827% over one year while maintaining textbook consistency across all timeframes—its ratio scores hit 98.3, and it passes all four SMA gates (30/50/100/200 day). The second-ranked ticker RCAT shows more moderate but still impressive momentum with 227% one-year returns and 87.7% three-month gains, though it displays a weaker six-month rebound (89.7%) suggesting some recent consolidation. A critical difference emerges in resilience: TNGX's "bad SPY days" score of 8.4 indicates exceptional downside protection during market weakness, whereas RCAT's score of 2.87 suggests it tends to fall harder when the broad market stumbles. Both tickers clear all moving-average hurdles and show ratio consistency, but TNGX's outsized 1-month to 1-week ratio jump of 18.48x and sustained outperformance versus SPY, QQQ, and IAU across all windows distinguish it as the more reliable momentum signal today.
